name: classNames
description: A utility function that combines classnames library with tailwind-merge to intelligently merge Tailwind CSS classes, resolving conflicts.
usage_guidelines: Use for combining multiple CSS class strings.
Automatically resolves Tailwind CSS class conflicts (e.g., 'p-4' overrides 'p-2').
Supports conditional classes, arrays, and objects.
Essential for component styling with dynamic classes.

params.name: args
params.description: Variable number of class arguments (strings, objects, arrays, conditionals).

return_value.description: Merged and deduplicated class string with Tailwind conflicts resolved.

Do: Use for all component className props
Dont: Don't worry about Tailwind class conflicts
